Shroud of Undeath  

Description

1: Add Proc: Shroud of Death Strike
2: Add effect: Icebone Skeletal Form

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 100 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 6
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 10 Deletable: No
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: A nimbus of deathly darkness covers your body.
Cast on other: Soandso 's body is surrounded by a nimbus of deathly darkness.

Game Description

Transforms you into a skeleton, imbuing your attacks with a chance to steal life energy from your target for 20.0 mins.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Shroud of Undeath

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Shroud of Undeath
ClassLevel
SHD55
Expansion:

Duration:
20.0 mins
  • Comments (38)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (1)
  • Screenshots
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Great spell!
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2012 at 9:46 AM Rating: Decent
Loyanna
Scholar
58 posts
I just picked this spell up in PoK for about 80pp ... oh how the mighty have fallen.

I love the skeleton look with the white smoke swirling down off your arms to the ground. My SK looks like a small sleketon army when I run around with my pet out and my Bloodbones merc!

Quote:
Description:

1: Add Proc: Burnout IV


Line one should be : 1: Add Proc: Shroud of Death Strike

Same for Shroud of Death spell.

Re: wrong spell for proc
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2009 at 2:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1691367413219
Guru
2,689 posts
Name listed is correct, but it still links to Burnout IV instead of the Death Shroud Strike. It appears, for some reason, your increasing the spell number by 1 on this particular one. Should be 1471, not 1472

EDIT: Lucy also showing name and linking to Burnout IV, but the raw data still has the correct value.

Yther Ore.

Edited, Dec 28th 2009 3:20pm by Yther

Battlemater Ska'tu
QuoteReply
# Nov 26 2008 at 6:35 AM Rating: Decent
staarlite
130 posts
Drops Shai'Din Revenant Bauble as well as this spell. Handy clicky for Sk's and Nec's (yeah, you guys have the spell, but it doesn't cost that all important mana).

Edited, Nov 27th 2008 12:20am by staarlite

Edited, Nov 27th 2008 12:20am by staarlite
▲ Page top
Hmm super easy hehe
QuoteReply
# May 19 2007 at 7:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591804183433
View User Forum
80 posts
I have a SK bot and decided to start playing him more since my 75 druid is about maxed out on aa's. Took my druid in, easily soloing up to 10 mobs at a time with reptile skin and a lot of DS. Got to the spawn spot, Ska'tu was up, killed him with many of his friends and the spell dropped. Elapsed time 10 minutes, I think I'll camp and see if I'm lucky again hehe.

Hmm super easy hehe

This spell is rediculous! I have camped this blasted mob for at least a month now, spending 4 hours each night I go down there and he usually pops only once or twice or not at all. Use this spell
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2004 at 11:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591816405398
41 posts
As a tank in a group, use your head and use a lifetap proc. If you have to ask why then you should not tank. Deathly temptation is not so great in a group if you are the tank.
▲ Page top
Just got this spell...
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2004 at 3:06 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591787835087
9 posts
Camped this guy 3 times ..

night 1 battlemaster spawned in 1 hour of camping and droped the necro/shad earing. Group had to go after that.

night 2 spawned 1 time in 3 hours and droped necro earring.

night 3 after 4 hours, spawned and droped necro earring, 10 mins later, spawned again and dropped the spell!!! about 20 mins later spawned again and droped the earring again as we were leaving.

I have never seen it in the baz, and had to break down and pay 18k for deathly temptation. And there is still 1 copy of that spell in the baz on MT for 18k if anyone wants it.

Thanks to my guild, Faveo Sulum Ipsemet Ascio on MT for camping this with me and helping me get this spell and an AA! LOL

Good luck to all future campers!

▲ Page top
Just got this spell...
QuoteReply

__DEL__1591787835087

Camped this guy 3 times ..

night 1 battlemaster spawned in 1 hour of camping and droped the necro/shad earing. Group had to go after that.

night 2 spawned 1 time in 3 hours and droped necro earring.

night 3 after 4 hours, spawned and droped necro earring, 10 mins later, spawned again and dropped the spell!!! about 20 mins later spawned again and droped the earring again as we were leaving.

I have never seen it in the baz, and had to bread down and pay 18k for deathly temptation. And there is still 1 copy of that spell in the baz on MT for 18k if anyone wants it.

Thanks to my guild, Faveo Sulum Ipsemet Ascio on MT for camping this with me and helping me get this spell and an AA! LOL

Good luck to all future campers!

QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2003 at 6:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965808789
4 posts
For all of you that got your spell in a few hours of camping, I just want to say "I hate you all!" I've also been trying to purchase this spell along with Deatly Temptation for the past 4 months. And no one is every selling it.

well 19999 But with the new skely graphic its worth it in my book

Research
QuoteReply
# Sep 17 2003 at 3:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258984314
3 posts
What are the components to research the spell: Shroud of Undeath ?
▲ Page top
Graveyard
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2003 at 12:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786543223
1 post
The graveyard in Chardok is area past Bridgekeeper over bridge on the way to Royals. Its called the graveyard because theres numerous skellies their that look like corpses till you aggro them. So if you want PH cross bridge heading to Royals, once across 2nd skellie on left is PH. Battlemaster whats his nuts drops the spell and earring. Hope this helps and good luck
▲ Page top
20k !?

8 posts
I have looked at several maps of Chardok. Where is the Graveyard located at in Chardok?
▲ Page top
It procs
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2003 at 1:20 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591781081168
1 post
This spell procs a 50 pt lifetap. Its the same proc as shroud of death. Skellie illusion also screws up your vision if your a Dark Elf. With exceptional heal 1, its tapped for 132. Drops in Chardok graveyard off of named skellie Battlemaster something or another. His PH is second skellie on the left. I had him spawn two times in a row. First time he dropped a Shai Din revenant bauble, Second time he dropped spell plus a wizzie spell. Spread the Hate

# May 23 2003 at 1:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754216242
38 posts
has effect. you must have low DEX or something. i've been using this since i got it in place of regular Shroud of Death, as i'm an ogre and it's nice to be smaller on raids or in tight places/dungeons.

skelly + proc. definately
▲ Page top
RE: Confirmation
QuoteReply
# May 13 2003 at 5:37 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592256405593
158 posts
Well the illusion does make DEs taller, while making ogre and trolls smaller (shrink is a wonderful thing for them) I never did get this spell wound up buying pact of hate at 64... i like the skellie illusion also great for charms that have illusion mods on them
